title: Revert Wool to String
description: Revert your Wool back into String
body:
## Did you just accidentally craft ALL your String into Wool? This Datapack is for you!

This Datapack simply allows for the uncrafting of Wool _of any color_. Obviously you will lose the dye in the process, but that's just balancing, now isn't it?


### This pack will only be updated periodically, not _every_ Minecraft update.
